root: ^Beware! There are many demons ahead... It's not safe!
^I don't care... I do what I want!
^I know! I'm here to kill them!
^I don't believe you. Demons aren't real!

rude: ^No need to be rude! The doors won't open while the demons live.
hero: ^Wow! looks like we have a hero in our midst. The doors will open once you succeed in killing the demons!
fool: ^Fool! Don't say I didn't warn you. When you do see the demons, kill them to open the door!
